fml.menu.mods.info.description.ae2termin: Adds a vanilla creative inventory order sort option to Applied Energistics 2 terminals. Adds configurable client-side compatibility options that can make AE2 terminal name sorting and mod sorting use registry-name based ordering, improving responsiveness in terminals that store many NBT-heavy items. When JEI is installed, adds an optional AE2 terminal sort option that follows JEI's item list order.
config.ae2terminalsort.enableCreativeSor: Enables the AE2 terminal sort option that follows the vanilla creative tab item order.
config.ae2terminalsort.enableJeiSortOrde: Enables the AE2 terminal sort option that follows JEI's item list order.
Makes AE2 terminal name sorting use registry-name based ordering instead of item display names. This improves responsiveness in terminals that store many NBT-heavy items. If disabled, opening a terminal that stores many items may make the game stop responding.
config.ae2terminalsort.optimizeModSort.t: Makes AE2 terminal mod sorting use registry-name based ordering within each mod. This improves responsiveness in terminals that store many NBT-heavy items. If disabled, opening a terminal that stores many items may make the game stop responding.
